import React from 'react'; import { FileText, DollarSign } from 'lucide-react'; import { formatCurrency } from '../../utils/formatters'; const IncomeForm = ({ incomeData, k1Data, businessDetails, onIncomeChange, onK1Change, onBusinessDetailsChange, t, UncontrolledInput }) => { const calculateNetBusinessIncome = () => { return (Number(businessDetails.grossReceipts) || 0) - (Number(businessDetails.costOfGoodsSold) || 0) - (Number(businessDetails.businessExpenses) || 0); }; return (

{t('income.title')}

{/* Basic Income Fields */}
{/* K-1 Forms Section */}

{t('income.k1Section.title')}

{/* Detailed Business Income Section */}

{t('income.businessDetails.title')}

{formatCurrency(calculateNetBusinessIncome())}
); }; export default IncomeForm;
